briefdescription.para: API Id.
API Id index.
Start address index.
End address index.
Payload argument count.
IPI Max timeout ~5sec.
Scatter write payload length.
Scatter write2 payload length.
FIPS write KAT mask payload length.
Maximum address buffers.
Maximum address list count.
List Id mask.
List Id shift.
Address buffer offset mask.
List Id index.
This function initializes Address Buffer List.
This function provides In Place PLM Update support.

parameterdescription.para:
is pointer to the command structure Command payload parameters are
High Addr
Low Addr

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to send psm_sequence commands data address and length to be processed by PSM.

parameterdescription.para: is the address of the buffer
is the length of the buffer in 32-bit word

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

briefdescription.para: This function is used to transfer all psm_sequence commands to PSM RAM regions which are then processed by PSM immediately.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to command structure

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_PROC_LPD_NOT_INITIALIZED if failed to initialize LPD.
XPLMI_UNSUPPORTED_PROC_LENGTH if received proc does not fit in the proc memory.

briefdescription.para: This function will write single 32 bit value to multiple addresses which are specified in the payload.

para.verbatim: Command payload parameters are - Value - Address[N]: array of N addresses

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

briefdescription.para: This function will write 2 32-bit values to multiple addresses which are specified by the payload.

detaileddescription.para:
Command payload parameters are
Value1
Value2
Address[N]: array of N addresses where Address[i] = Value1 and Address[i] + 4 = Value2

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

briefdescription.para: This function will store the KAT mask set by the user so that PLM can monitor the RTCA and compare it with KAT masks before going into FIPS operational state.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

briefdescription.para: This function will run the already stored proc if present.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if success and error code if failure

briefdescription.para: This function will create a list with given list of addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if success and error code if failure

briefdescription.para: This function will execute write for the requested list of addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if success and error code if failure

briefdescription.para: This function will execute mask write for the requested list of addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if success and error code if failure

briefdescription.para: This function will execute mask poll for the requested list of addresses.

parameterdescription.para: is pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if success and error code if failure

briefdescription.para: This file contains versalnet specific cmds and modules logic.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ==== ==== ======== ======================================================- 1.00 bm 07/06/2022 Initial release ma 07/08/2022 Add ScatterWrite and ScatterWrite2 commands to versal ma 07/08/2022 Add support for Tamper Trigger over IPI ma 07/29/2022 Replaced XPAR_XIPIPSU_0_DEVICE_ID macro with XPLMI_IPI_DEVICE_ID bm 09/14/2022 Move ScatterWrite commands from common to versal_net 1.01 ng 11/11/2022 Fixed doxygen file name error kpt 01/04/2023 Added XPlmi_SetFipsKatMask command dd 03/28/2023 Updated doxygen comments ng 03/30/2023 Updated algorithm and return values in doxygen comments 1.02 bm 06/23/2023 Removed existing hardcoded logic of validating IPI commands bm 07/06/2023 Added XPlmi_RunProc command bm 07/06/2023 Refactored Proc logic to more generic logic bm 07/06/2023 Added List commands sk 08/29/2023 Updated IPI Timeout to ~5sec to avoid any DoS issue 2.00 ng 12/15/2023 Added offset support to list commands ng 02/14/2024 removed int typecast for errors jb 03/19/2024 Updated XPLMI_MAX_ADDR_BUFFERS count from 1 to 3 am 04/04/2024 Fixed doxygen warnings 2.4 abh 10/10/2025 Fixed MISRA-C violations
